name: Oven-Barbecued Turkey Legs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour with salt, chili powder and pepper; dredge turkey legs in the flour mixture.
2. Heat oil in a large skillet; brown turkey legs, turning to ensure all sides are browned.
3. Remove turkey legs to a 13x9x2-inch pan.
4. Combine barbecue sauce, water and crushed bouillon cube; spoon over turkey legs.
5. Cover pan with foil; bake at 325°F for 1 hour.
6. Uncover and bake for an additional 1 hour, until the turkey is tender and basting frequently.
